headline: MetLife and Highlights Launch Free Soccer-Themed Digital Magazine to Help Boost Kid’s Confidence
summary: NEW YORK, June 02, 2026--MetLife today announced a new collaboration with Highlights to introduce a custom digital magazine designed to help children build more confident futures through fun, engaging educational resources. headline: MetLife’s More Flexible Annuity Design Might Change The Case For Investing In MetLife (MET)
summary: In May 2026, MetLife introduced a new liquidity feature to its MetLife Guaranteed Income Program immediate income annuity, allowing defined contribution plan participants to cancel within three years and receive a premium refund, minus benefits already paid, without cancellation or surrender fees.
